description_long: This is a rugged, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with a weathered yellow exterior and a compact, aggressive stance. The vehicle features four large, knobby tires designed for off-road performance, and a prominent exposed engine with red cylinder heads and visible exhaust pipes at the rear. The front end is characterized by a pair of cartoonish headlights and a stylized face motif, adding a playful yet fierce appearance. The cabin is open with no doors or roof, and a single round steering wheel is mounted on the left side, with a roll cage structure providing occupant protection. A mounted weapon or accessory is attached above the roll cage, suggesting a combat or adventure theme. The overall build is robust, with metallic and composite materials dominating the construction, suitable for urban and rugged environments.
description: A weathered yellow open-frame all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, exposed engine, roll cage, and a cartoonish face motif on the front. Features include a round steering wheel and a mounted accessory above the cabin.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, round steering wheel, exposed engine, and mounted accessory above the roll cage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the exposed engine, rear tires, and the roll cage structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open frame, visible interior, and the cartoonish face motif on the front.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the cartoonish headlights, face motif, and the open cabin with the steering wheel visible.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose or uneven terrain, suitable for off-road and all-terrain use.
